hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】鲍威尔认为通胀前景受到控制，无需因石油冲击而加息；【FINANCE】沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场；【FINANCE】美联储理事米兰仍然支持降息，称今年利率可能会降低“约一个点”。

items.title: Powell sees inflation outlook in check, no need to hike rates because of oil shock
items.summary: Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell spoke Monday at Harvard University.
items.title_zh: 鲍威尔认为通胀前景受到控制，无需因石油冲击而加息
items.summary_zh: 美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔周一在哈佛大学发表讲话。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he sold Apple too soon and would buy more of it, though not in this market
items.summary: Apple remains Berkshire Hathaway's largest holding even after the conglomerate trimmed its stake at the end of last year.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他太早卖掉了苹果公司，并将购买更多苹果公司，尽管不是在这个市场
items.summary_zh: 即使伯克希尔哈撒韦公司去年底减持了其股份，苹果公司仍然是伯克希尔哈撒韦公司最大的持股公司。

items.title: Fed Governor Miran still backs cuts, says interest rates could be 'about a point' lower this year
items.summary: Federal Reserve Governor Stephen Miran spoke Monday on CNBC's "Squawk on the Street."
items.title_zh: 美联储理事米兰仍然支持降息，称今年利率可能会降低“约一个点”
items.summary_zh: 美联储理事斯蒂芬·米兰周一在 CNBC 的“Squawk on the Street”节目中发表讲话。

items.title: A quantum computer may need just 10,000 qubits to empty your crypto wallets, researchers say
items.summary: The research shows quantum computers may break bitcoin and ether wallet encryption with far fewer qubits than previously thought, accelerating the push toward post-quantum security.
items.title_zh: 研究人员表示，量子计算机可能只需要 10,000 个量子位就能清空你的加密钱包
items.summary_zh: 研究表明，量子计算机可能会用比之前想象的少得多的量子比特来破解比特币和以太坊钱包加密，从而加速推动后量子安全。

items.title: Google warns five quantum attack paths could put $100 billion on Ethereum at risk
items.summary: A 57-page whitepaper identifies how future quantum computers could target Ethereum's wallets, smart contracts, staking system, Layer 2 networks and data verification layer, with combined exposure exceeding $100 billion.
items.title_zh: 谷歌警告称，五种量子攻击路径可能使以太坊 1000 亿美元面临风险
items.summary_zh: 一份长达 57 页的白皮书确定了未来量子计算机如何瞄准以太坊的钱包、智能合约、质押系统、第 2 层网络和数据验证层，总风险超过 1000 亿美元。

items.title: MIT engineers design proteins by their motion, not just their shape
items.summary: An AI model generates novel proteins based on how they vibrate and move, opening new possibilities for dynamic biomaterials and adaptive therapeutics.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的工程师根据蛋白质的运动而不仅仅是形状来设计蛋白质
items.summary_zh: 人工智能模型根据蛋白质的振动和移动方式生成新型蛋白质，为动态生物材料和适应性治疗开辟了新的可能性。

items.title: Augmenting citizen science with computer vision for fish monitoring
items.summary: MIT Sea Grant works with the Woodwell Climate Research Center and other collaborators to demonstrate a deep learning-based system for fish monitoring.
items.title_zh: 通过鱼类监测的计算机视觉增强公民科学
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院海洋格兰特与伍德韦尔气候研究中心和其他合作者合作，展示了一种基于深度学习的鱼类监测系统。

items.title: Warren Buffett says he’s still making calls on investments at Berkshire, flags ‘tiny’ new buy
items.summary: The 95-year-old investor said he still comes into the office daily and stays engaged with markets.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特表示，他仍在呼吁伯克希尔的投资，并表示“小规模”新收购
items.summary_zh: 这位 95 岁的投资者表示，他仍然每天来到办公室并与市场保持联系。

items.title: Warren Buffett teams up with NBA superstar Stephen Curry for charity lunch, reviving iconic auction
items.summary: The winning bidder — along with up to seven guests — will join Buffett and the Currys for an exclusive lunch in Omaha, Nebraska.
items.title_zh: 沃伦·巴菲特与 NBA 巨星斯蒂芬·库里合作举办慈善午餐，复兴标志性拍卖
items.summary_zh: 中标者以及最多七位客人将在内布拉斯加州奥马哈与巴菲特和库里家族一起享用独家午餐。

items.title: Three niche commodity prices are surging. What they show about China's grip on supply chains
items.summary: In the wake of the Iran war, prices are surging for critical elements used in defense and the semiconductors that power artificial intelligence advances.
items.title_zh: 三大利基商品价格大幅上涨。它们显示了中国对供应链的控制
items.summary_zh: 伊朗战争后，用于国防的关键元件和推动人工智能进步的半导体的价格飙升。

items.title: Bill Ackman says it’s one of the best times in a long time to buy quality stocks
items.summary: Ackman's bullish stance comes at a time when markets have been rattled by rising energy prices and sticky inflation concerns.
items.title_zh: 比尔·阿克曼表示，这是长期以来购买优质股票的最佳时机之一
items.summary_zh: 阿克曼的看涨立场是在市场因能源价格上涨和通胀担忧而感到不安之际提出的。

items.title: Watch Fed Chair Jerome Powell speak live to an economics class at Harvard
items.summary: This will be one of Powell's final scheduled public appearances before his term ends in May.
items.title_zh: 观看美联储主席杰罗姆·鲍威尔在哈佛大学经济学课上的现场演讲
items.summary_zh: 这将是鲍威尔在五月份任期结束前最后一次公开露面。

items.title: China bans storing cremated remains in empty 'bone ash apartments'
items.summary: China bans 'bone ash apartments' where mourners are storing cremated remains instead of cemeteries.
items.title_zh: 中国禁止将火化遗体存放在空置的“骨灰公寓”中
items.summary_zh: 中国禁止哀悼者存放火化遗体的“骨灰公寓”，而不是墓地。

items.title: Kuwaiti Tanker Full of Oil Struck Off Dubai Day After Trump’s Threats
items.summary: The vessel caught fire and sustained damage, its owner said on Tuesday, adding that there was the potential for an oil spill in surrounding waters. On Monday, President Trump warned Iran that without a deal he would order attacks on infrastructure targets.
items.title_zh: 特朗普发出威胁后，满载石油的科威特油轮在迪拜附近被击沉
items.summary_zh: 船东周二表示，该船起火并遭受损坏，并补充说周围水域有可能发生漏油事故。周一，特朗​​普总统警告伊朗，如果没有达成协议，他将下令袭击基础设施目标。

items.title: Europe Has a ‘Guns vs. Butter’ Problem. War in Iran Makes It Worse.
items.summary: After decades of prioritizing domestic over military spending, the continent’s leaders are trying to pivot. That is straining national budgets and could anger voters.
items.title_zh: 欧洲存在“大炮与黄油”问题。伊朗战争使情况变得更糟。
items.summary_zh: 几十年来，非洲大陆的领导人一直将国内支出置于军事支出之上，现在正在尝试调整方向。这导致国家预算紧张，并可能激怒选民。

items.title: These Two Countries With Social Media Bans Aren’t Happy With Google and Meta
items.summary: Indonesia says the two companies are violating its law that bars children under 16 from the social media. Australia has similar concerns.
items.title_zh: 这两个禁止社交媒体的国家对谷歌和 Meta 并不满意
items.summary_zh: 印度尼西亚表示，这两家公司违反了禁止 16 岁以下儿童使用社交媒体的法律。澳大利亚也有类似的担忧。

items.title: How the U.K.’s Leader Decides Which U.S. Bombers to Let Fly Against Iran
items.summary: As the United States expands its armada of warplanes on British soil, Prime Minister Keir Starmer says he is trying to defend Britain’s interests while keeping the country out of war.
items.title_zh: 英国领导人如何决定让哪架美国轰炸机飞往伊朗
items.summary_zh: 随着美国在英国领土上扩大战机舰队，英国首相基尔·斯塔默表示，他正在努力捍卫英国的利益，同时让英国远离战争。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) gains 1.5% as index trades flat
items.summary: NEAR Protocol (NEAR), up 1.9% from Monday, joined Bitcoin Cash (BCH) as a top performer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：比特币现金 (BCH) 上涨 1.5%，指数交易持平
items.summary_zh: NEAR Protocol (NEAR) 较周一上涨 1.9%，与比特币现金 (BCH) 一起成为表现最好的。

items.title: Coinbase’s Base to focus on tokenized markets, stablecoins, developers this year
items.summary: The move comes as the chain distances itself from Optimism technology and toward in-house infrastructure as it seeks greater independence and scale.
items.title_zh: Coinbase 今年的 Base 将重点关注代币化市场、稳定币和开发商
items.summary_zh: 此举之际，该连锁店正与 Optimism 技术保持距离，转向内部基础设施，以寻求更大的独立性和规模。

items.title: Forex startup OpenFX raises $94 million to expand stablecoin-powered cross-border payments
items.summary: The company acts as a bridge between traditional banking and digital assets, enabling faster and cheaper foreign-exchange conversions for businesses moving large sums of money.
items.title_zh: 外汇初创公司 OpenFX 融资 9400 万美元，以扩大稳定币驱动的跨境支付
items.summary_zh: 该公司充当传统银行和数字资产之间的桥梁，为大额资金转移的企业提供更快、更便宜的外汇兑换。

items.title: Core Foundation franchises Satoshi Plus bitcoin consensus model for new Zcash scaling layer
items.summary: Kieran Dennis, co-founder of Z and an initial contributor to Core, claims Z is the first attempt to bring native EVM capabilities to Zcash.
items.title_zh: Core Foundation 特许经营 Satoshi Plus 比特币共识模型，用于新的 Zcash 扩展层
items.summary_zh: Z 的联合创始人兼 Core 的初始贡献者 Kieran Dennis 声称 Z 是将原生 EVM 功能引入 Zcash 的首次尝试。

items.title: ‘Unstable velocity’: Standard Chartered says stablecoin usage rising faster than expected as new use cases emerge
items.summary: The bank maintained its $2 trillion stablecoin market cap forecast by 2028 amid a sharp increase in turnover from use cases like AI payments.
items.title_zh: “速度不稳定”：渣打银行表示，随着新用例的出现，稳定币使用量的增长速度快于预期
items.summary_zh: 由于人工智能支付等用例的营业额急剧增加，该银行维持了到 2028 年稳定币市值将达到 2 万亿美元的预测。

items.title: Trending Crypto: edgeX (EDGE)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #206.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：edgeX (EDGE)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 206 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #24.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：Zcash (ZEC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 24 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Pudgy Penguins (PENGU)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #109.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：矮胖企鹅 (PENGU)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 109 位。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bitcoin (BTC)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #1.
items.title_zh: 流行加密货币：比特币 (BTC)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第一。

items.title: Trending Crypto: Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary: CoinGecko trending rank #35.
items.title_zh: 加密货币趋势：Bittensor (TAO)
items.summary_zh: CoinGecko 趋势排名第 35 位。

items.title: Helping developers build safer AI experiences for teens
items.summary: OpenAI releases prompt-based teen safety policies for developers using gpt-oss-safeguard, helping moderate age-specific risks in AI systems.
items.title_zh: 帮助开发者为青少年打造更安全的人工智能体验
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 使用 gpt-oss-safeguard 为开发人员发布基于提示的青少年安全策略，帮助缓解 AI 系统中特定年龄的风险。

items.title: OpenAI to acquire Astral
items.summary: Accelerates Codex growth to power the next generation of Python developer tools
items.title_zh: OpenAI 收购 Astral
items.summary_zh: 加速 Codex 的发展，为下一代 Python 开发工具提供动力

items.title: Liberate your OpenClaw
items.title_zh: 解放你的 OpenClaw

items.title: MIT researchers use AI to uncover atomic defects in materials
items.summary: A new model measures defects that can be leveraged to improve materials’ mechanical strength, heat transfer, and energy-conversion efficiency.
items.title_zh: 麻省理工学院的研究人员利用人工智能发现材料中的原子缺陷
items.summary_zh: 一种新模型可测量可用来提高材料机械强度、传热和能量转换效率的缺陷。

items.title: AI system learns to keep warehouse robot traffic running smoothly
items.summary: This new approach adapts to decide which robots should get the right of way at every moment, avoiding congestion and increasing throughput.
items.title_zh: 人工智能系统学习保持仓库机器人交通平稳运行
items.summary_zh: 这种新方法可以随时决定哪些机器人应该获得通行权，从而避免拥堵并提高吞吐量。

items.title: Wristband enables wearers to control a robotic hand with their own movements
items.summary: By moving their hands and fingers, users can direct a robot to play piano or shoot a basketball, or they can manipulate objects in a virtual environment.
items.title_zh: 腕带使佩戴者能够通过自己的动作控制机械手
items.summary_zh: 通过移动他们的手和手指，用户可以指挥机器人弹钢琴或投篮球，或者他们可以操纵虚拟环境中的物体。

items.title: Eurovision Song Contest launches first-ever Asia edition
items.summary: Broadcasters from 10 countries, including South Korea and the Philippines, will be taking part.
items.title_zh: 欧洲歌唱大赛推出首个亚洲版
items.summary_zh: 来自韩国和菲律宾等 10 个国家的广播公司将参加。

items.title: Bitfarms targets zero bitcoin on the balance sheet as it pivots to AI
items.summary: The company is actively selling bitcoin and redeploying capital into AI-focused data centers as part of a broader transformation away from mining.
items.title_zh: Bitfarms 的目标是资产负债表上的零比特币，因为它转向人工智能
items.summary_zh: 该公司正在积极销售比特币，并将资本重新部署到以人工智能为中心的数据中心，作为从采矿业更广泛转型的一部分。

items.title: Downside risk remains as bitcoin nears record-tying six-month losing streak
items.summary: A close below $67,300 for bitcoin would confirm six straight monthly losses amid ongoing macro pressures.
items.title_zh: 随着比特币接近创纪录的六个月连续下跌，下行风险依然存在
items.summary_zh: 比特币收盘价低于 67,300 美元将确认在持续的宏观压力下连续六个月下跌。

items.title: Quantum risk resurfaces at the worst time for bitcoin, but 1 token is loving it
items.summary: Your day-ahead look for March 31, 2026
items.title_zh: 量子风险在比特币最糟糕的时候重新出现，但 1 个代币却很喜欢它
items.summary_zh: 2026 年 3 月 31 日天气预报

items.title: Plume pilots payroll system allowing employees to receive part of salary in WisdomTree tokenized fund
items.summary: Plume has launched a payroll pilot that lets employees receive part of their salary in tokenized money-market fund shares.
items.title_zh: Plume 试点工资系统，允许员工在 WisdomTree 代币化基金中获得部分工资
items.summary_zh: Plume 推出了一项工资试点，让员工可以通过代币化货币市场基金份额获得部分工资。

items.title: Bhutan government moves another $25 million in bitcoin as weekly transfers top 1,000 BTC: Arkham
items.summary: Onchain analysts noted that the recipient address had previously transferred bitcoin to investment manager Galaxy Digital.
items.title_zh: 不丹政府又转移了 2500 万美元的比特币，每周转账量已突破 1,000 个比特币：Arkham
items.summary_zh: Onchain分析师指出，收款人地址此前已将比特币转移给投资管理公司Galaxy Digital。

items.title: Interactive Brokers launches crypto trading in EEA, including BTC, ETH, SOL and XRP
items.summary: Interactive Brokers launched crypto trading for eligible EEA investors, offering 11 cryptocurrencies alongside stocks and futures.
items.title_zh: 盈透证券在欧洲经济区推出加密货币交易，包括 BTC、ETH、SOL 和 XRP
items.summary_zh: 盈透证券为符合条件的欧洲经济区投资者推出了加密货币交易，除了股票和期货之外，还提供 11 种加密货币。

items.title: Bitcoin flirts with $66K as geopolitical tensions, macro uncertainty keep market range-bound
items.summary: Bitcoin floats just above $66,000 as geopolitical risks, macro uncertainty, and low liquidity keep price action range-bound ahead of Q2.
items.title_zh: 由于地缘政治紧张局势和宏观不确定性导致市场区间波动，比特币价格触及 6.6 万美元
items.summary_zh: 由于地缘政治风险、宏观不确定性和低流动性使第二季度之前价格走势保持区间波动，比特币价格略高于 66,000 美元。

items.title: Inside our approach to the Model Spec
items.summary: Learn how OpenAI’s Model Spec serves as a public framework for model behavior, balancing safety, user freedom, and accountability as AI systems advance.
items.title_zh: 深入了解我们的模型规格方法
items.summary_zh: 了解 OpenAI 的模型规范如何作为模型行为的公共框架，随着人工智能系统的进步，平衡安全性、用户自由和责任。

items.title: Introducing the OpenAI Safety Bug Bounty program
items.summary: OpenAI launches a Safety Bug Bounty program to identify AI abuse and safety risks, including agentic vulnerabilities, prompt injection, and data exfiltration.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 安全漏洞赏金计划简介
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出安全漏洞赏金计划，以识别人工智能滥用和安全风险，包括代理漏洞、提示注入和数据泄露。

items.title: Update on the OpenAI Foundation
items.summary: The OpenAI Foundation announces plans to invest at least $1 billion in curing diseases, economic opportunity, AI resilience, and community programs.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 基金会的最新动态
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 基金会宣布计划投资至少 10 亿美元用于治疗疾病、经济机会、人工智能复原力和社区项目。

items.title: Creating with Sora Safely
items.summary: To address the novel safety challenges posed by a state-of-the-art video model as well as a new social creation platform, we’ve built Sora 2 and the Sora app with safety at the foundation. Our approach is anchored in concrete protections.
items.title_zh: 与 Sora 一起安全地创作
items.summary_zh: 为了解决最先进的视频模型和新的社交创作平台带来的新的安全挑战，我们构建了以安全为基础的 Sora 2 和 Sora 应用程序。我们的方法以具体的保护为基础。

items.title: Build a Domain-Specific Embedding Model in Under a Day
items.title_zh: 在一天之内构建特定领域的嵌入模型

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.summary: Lyria 3 is now available in paid preview through the Gemini API and for testing in Google AI Studio.
items.title_zh: 使用我们最新的音乐生成模型 Lyria 3 进行构建
items.summary_zh: Lyria 3 现已通过 Gemini API 提供付费预览版，并可在 Google AI Studio 中进行测试。

items.title: Advancing international trade research and finding community
items.summary: Sojun Park, a postdoc at the Center for International Studies, has learned much from his research on intellectual property as well as his interactions with students and mentors at MIT.
items.title_zh: 推进国际贸易研究和寻找社区
items.summary_zh: Sojun Park 是国际研究中心的博士后，他从知识产权研究以及与麻省理工学院学生和导师的互动中学到了很多东西。

items.title: On algorithms, life, and learning
items.summary: Operations research expert Dimitris Bertsimas delivered the annual Killian Lecture, providing a look at the past and future of his work.
items.title_zh: 论算法、生活、学习
items.summary_zh: 运筹学专家 Dimitris Bertsimas 发表了年度基利安讲座，回顾了他工作的过去和未来。

items.title: Huawei's cloud computing revenue dropped in 2025 as Chinese AI lagged U.S. rivals
items.summary: When including internal customers, the telecommunications giant said cloud computing revenue grew from a year ago.
items.title_zh: 中国AI落后美国竞争对手，华为2025年云计算收入下降
items.summary_zh: 当包括内部客户时，这家电信巨头表示云计算收入较一年前有所增长。

items.title: As stocks and bonds fall, and oil hits $100, a futures trade that boomed in 2022 may again be a winner
items.summary: Managed futures, which track macro themes expected to play out over months, do well when traditional assets are falling. This could be one of those times.
items.title_zh: 随着股票和债券下跌，油价触及 100 美元，2022 年蓬勃发展的期货交易可能再次成为赢家
items.summary_zh: 管理期货跟踪预计将在数月内显现的宏观主题，在传统资产下跌时表现良好。这可能是其中之一。

items.title: Wolf bites woman in shock German attack in Hamburg shopping street
items.summary: It is believed to be the first wolf attack on a human since the animals began to reestablish themselves in Germany decades ago.
items.title_zh: 德国汉堡购物街袭击事件，狼咬伤妇女
items.summary_zh: 据信，这是自几十年前这些动物开始在德国重建家园以来，首次发生狼袭击人类的事件。

items.title: Sexual violence part of 'everyday life' in parts of Sudan, charity says
items.summary: Victims describe how they have been targeted while carrying out everyday activities.
items.title_zh: 慈善机构称，性暴力是苏丹部分地区“日常生活”的一部分
items.summary_zh: 受害者描述了他们在日常活动中如何成为攻击目标的。

items.title: Russian oil tanker docks in Cuba ending near-total blockade
items.summary: A Russian oil tanker has docked in Cuba, providing temporary relief after months of shortages.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯油轮停靠古巴结束近乎全面封锁
items.summary_zh: 一艘俄罗斯油轮停靠在古巴，在数月的石油短缺后提供了暂时的缓解。

items.title: At least 16 killed, thousands displaced by gang attack in rural Haiti
items.summary: The attack happened in the Artibonite region, where members of the Gran Grif gang have targeted locals in the past.
items.title_zh: 海地农村地区帮派袭击造成至少16人死亡、数千人流离失所
items.summary_zh: 此次袭击发生在阿蒂博尼特地区，格兰格里夫帮派成员过去曾以当地人为目标。

items.title: Kissing a woman's hand can be sexual assault, Spanish court finds
items.summary: The Supreme Court found that a man had done more than harass a woman by kissing her hand as there had been "a clear sexual component" to his behaviour.
items.title_zh: 西班牙法院裁定亲吻女性手可能构成性侵犯
items.summary_zh: 最高法院认为，一名男子的行为不仅仅是通过亲吻一名妇女的手来骚扰她，因为他的行为中存在“明显的性成分”。

items.title: Teen cyclist killed at Road World Championships not found for 82 minutes
items.summary: A cyclist who was killed during the Road World Championships was not found for 82 minutes after a crash, investigators find.
items.title_zh: 公路世锦赛青少年自行车手遇难82分钟仍未找到
items.summary_zh: 调查人员发现，一名在公路世锦赛期间丧生的自行车手在事故发生后 82 分钟内仍未找到。

items.title: Congressman writes to King Charles urging him to meet Epstein victims during US visit
items.summary: While the trip is not officially confirmed, the King and Queen Camilla are reportedly planning to visit the US at the end of April.
items.title_zh: 国会议员写信给查尔斯国王，敦促他在美国访问期间会见爱泼斯坦的受害者
items.summary_zh: 虽然此次行程尚未得到官方确认，但据报道，国王和卡米拉王后计划于四月底访问美国。

items.title: Palestinians convicted of lethal attacks face death penalty under new Israeli law
items.summary: The new law, passed on Monday, was pushed hard by the far-right and Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir.
items.title_zh: 根据以色列新法律，被判犯有致命袭击罪的巴勒斯坦人将面临死刑
items.summary_zh: 周一通过的新法律得到了极右翼兼安全部长伊塔马尔·本-格维尔的大力推动。

items.title: Putin’s Internet Blackout: A Chaotic Drive to Cut Off Russians From the World
items.summary: With new outages and blockages, President Vladimir V. Putin is taking his boldest steps yet to control Russians’ communications.
items.title_zh: 普京的互联网封锁：切断俄罗斯人与世界联系的混乱行动
items.summary_zh: 随着新的断电和封锁，弗拉基米尔·V·普京总统正在采取迄今为止最大胆的措施来控制俄罗斯人的通讯。

items.title: First Canadian Astronaut Will Travel to the Moon Amid Fraying U.S.-Canada Relations
items.summary: Canada will send its first astronaut to the moon on a joint mission with the United States, but back on Earth, the relationship between the two countries is fraying.
items.title_zh: 首位加拿大宇航员将在美加关系紧张之际前往月球
items.summary_zh: 加拿大将与美国联合派遣第一位宇航员前往月球，但回到地球后，两国之间的关系正在紧张。

items.title: U.S. Senators Press Taiwan to Raise Military Spending, as China Protests
items.summary: Four visiting senators urged Taiwan to break an impasse over a $40 billion budget proposal, highlighting concerns in Washington about the threat from China.
items.title_zh: 中国抗议，美国参议员施压台湾增加军费
items.summary_zh: 四名来访的参议员敦促台湾打破 400 亿美元预算提案的僵局，凸显华盛顿对中国威胁的担忧。

items.title: A Cat-and-Mouse Game of Russian Internet Restrictions and Evasion
items.summary: As the Kremlin spends heavily on censorship technology, Russians are scrambling to find new ways to circumvent the limits.
items.title_zh: 俄罗斯互联网限制和规避的猫捉老鼠游戏
items.summary_zh: 由于克里姆林宫在审查技术上投入巨资，俄罗斯人正在争先恐后地寻找新的方法来规避限制。

items.title: When Will Japan’s Cherry Blossoms Bloom? A.I. Can Help Answer That
items.summary: Experts use artificial intelligence to analyze data, plus thousands of crowdsourced photos, to forecast the prized flowers, which are a multibillion-dollar attraction.
items.title_zh: 日本的樱花什么时候开？人工智能。可以帮忙回答一下
items.summary_zh: 专家们利用人工智能分析数据，加上数千张众包照片，来预测价值数十亿美元的珍贵花朵。

items.title: He Led Congo for 18 Years. Now, Joseph Kabila Is a Hunted Man.
items.summary: Joseph Kabila, the former president, faces the death penalty after the government convicted him of treason last year. He says the charges are bogus.
items.title_zh: 他领导刚果18年。现在，约瑟夫·卡比拉是一名被追捕的人。
items.summary_zh: 前总统约瑟夫·卡比拉在政府去年被判定犯有叛国罪后面临死刑。他说这些指控是伪造的。

items.title: Chainalysis adds 'natural language' AI agents to its blockchain investigation platform
items.summary: CEO Jonathan Levin says it marks a "really important moment" for making such analysis more accessible as the crypto industry grows with non-native entrants.
items.title_zh: Chainaanalysis 在其区块链调查平台中添加了“自然语言”人工智能代理
items.summary_zh: 首席执行官乔纳森·莱文（Jonathan Levin）表示，随着加密货币行业随着非本地进入者的不断发展，这标志着一个“非常重要的时刻”，使此类分析变得更加容易。

items.title: Prediction markets backlash builds possible stormcloud for 2027
items.summary: Odds favor a Democratic rise in Congress next year, when lawmakers who've begun going after firms such as Kalshi and Polymarket may have greater sway.
items.title_zh: 预测市场的强烈反对可能会导致 2027 年出现暴风雨
items.summary_zh: 民主党明年在国会崛起的可能性很大，届时开始追查 Kalshi 和 Polymarket 等公司的立法者可能会拥有更大的影响力。

items.title: Tether parts ways with ex-HSBC gold traders amid KPMG audit: Bloomberg
items.summary: Tether has let go of two former HSBC metals traders months after hiring them to build out its gold trading desk.
items.title_zh: Tether 在毕马威审计中与前汇丰黄金交易员分道扬镳：彭博社
items.summary_zh: Tether 解雇了两名前汇丰银行金属交易员，几个月后他们聘请了两名前汇丰金属交易员来建立其黄金交易部门。

items.title: Chainalysis introduces ‘blockchain intelligence agents’ trained on millions of investigations
items.summary: The autonomous bots are trained on Chainalysis' massive, proprietary dataset built from over a decade in business.
items.title_zh: Chainaanalysis 推出经过数百万次调查训练的“区块链情报代理”
items.summary_zh: 这些自主机器人接受了 Chainaanalysis 的大规模专有数据集的训练，这些数据集是在十多年来的业务中构建的。

items.title: MiCA-licensed crypto asset manager Tesseract unveils compliance-minded yield vaults
items.summary: Tesseract tested its vault architecture with six pilot participants, including crypto ETP issuer 21Shares.
items.title_zh: MiCA 授权的加密资产管理公司 Tesseract 推出合规收益金库
items.summary_zh: Tesseract 与六名试点参与者测试了其保险库架构，其中包括加密货币 ETP 发行人 21Shares。

items.title: Dubai’s VARA imposes margin, governance, and disclosure rules on crypto trading and derivatives
items.summary: Dubai’s VARA issued new rules mandating governance, disclosure and risk controls for VASPs offering crypto derivatives and exchange services.
items.title_zh: 迪拜 VARA 对加密货币交易和衍生品实施保证金、治理和披露规则
items.summary_zh: 迪拜的 VARA 发布了新规则，要求对提供加密衍生品和交易服务的 VASP 进行治理、披露和风险控制。

items.title: Helping disaster response teams turn AI into action across Asia
items.summary: AI for Disaster Response in Asia: OpenAI Workshop with Gates Foundation
items.title_zh: 帮助救灾团队将人工智能转化为亚洲各地的行动
items.summary_zh: 亚洲救灾人工智能：与盖茨基金会合作的 OpenAI 研讨会

items.title: STADLER reshapes knowledge work at a 230-year-old company
items.summary: Learn how STADLER uses ChatGPT to transform knowledge work, saving time and accelerating productivity across 650 employees.
items.title_zh: STADLER 重塑一家拥有 230 年历史的公司的知识工作
items.summary_zh: 了解 STADLER 如何使用 ChatGPT 来转变知识工作，从而节省 650 名员工的时间并提高工作效率。

items.title: Powering product discovery in ChatGPT
items.summary: ChatGPT introduces richer, visually immersive shopping powered by the Agentic Commerce Protocol, enabling product discovery, side-by-side comparisons, and merchant integration.
items.title_zh: 推动 ChatGPT 中的产品发现
items.summary_zh: ChatGPT 引入了由 Agentic Commerce Protocol 支持的更丰富、视觉沉浸式购物，从而实现产品发现、并排比较和商家集成。

items.title: How we monitor internal coding agents for misalignment
items.summary: How OpenAI uses chain-of-thought monitoring to study misalignment in internal coding agents—analyzing real-world deployments to detect risks and strengthen AI safety safeguards.
items.title_zh: 我们如何监控内部编码代理的错位
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 如何使用思想链监控来研究内部编码代理的错位——分析现实世界的部署以检测风险并加强人工智能安全保障。

items.title: TRL v1.0: Post-Training Library Built to Move with the Field
items.title_zh: TRL v1.0：专为随场移动而构建的训练后库

items.title: A New Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents (EVA)
items.title_zh: 评估语音代理 (EVA) 的新框架

items.title: What's New in Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite Libraries Release
items.title_zh: Mellea 0.4.0 + Granite 库版本的新增功能

items.title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
items.title_zh: 拥抱开源的现状：2026 年春季

items.title: Holotron-12B - High Throughput Computer Use Agent
items.title_zh: Holotron-12B - 高吞吐量计算机使用代理

items.title: Introducing Storage Buckets on the Hugging Face Hub
items.title_zh: Hugging Face Hub 上引入存储桶

items.title: Keep the Tokens Flowing: Lessons from 16 Open-Source RL Libraries
items.title_zh: 保持代币流动：来自 16 个开源 RL 库的经验教训

items.title: Ulysses Sequence Parallelism: Training with Million-Token Contexts
items.title_zh: Ulysses 序列并行性：使用百万令牌上下文进行训练

items.title: Watch James Manyika talk AI and creativity with LL COOL J.
items.summary: In the latest episode of our Dialogues on Technology and Society series, LL COOL J sits down with James Manyika.
items.title_zh: 观看 James Manyika 与 LL COOL J 谈论人工智能和创造力。
items.summary_zh: 在我们的技术与社会对话系列的最新一集中，LL COOL J 与 James Manyika 进行了访谈。

items.title: Transform your headphones into a live personal translator on iOS.
items.summary: Google Translate’s Live translate with headphones is officially arriving on iOS! And we're expanding the capability for both iOS and Android users to even more countries…
items.title_zh: 将您的耳机变成 iOS 上的实时个人翻译器。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌翻译的耳机实时翻译功能正式登陆 iOS！我们正在将 iOS 和 Android 用户的功能扩展到更多国家/地区……

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live: Making audio AI more natural and reliable
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live is now available across Google products.
items.title_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live：让音频AI更加自然可靠
items.summary_zh: Gemini 3.1 Flash Live 现已在 Google 产品中提供。

items.title: Search Live is expanding globally
items.summary: We’re expanding Search Live globally, to all languages and locations where AI Mode is available.
items.title_zh: Search Live 正在全球扩张
items.summary_zh: 我们正在全球范围内将 Search Live 扩展到支持 AI 模式的所有语言和地点。

items.title: Lyria 3 Pro: Create longer tracks in more Google products
items.summary: We are bringing Lyria 3 to the tools where professionals work and create every day.
items.title_zh: Lyria 3 Pro：在更多 Google 产品中创建更长的曲目
items.summary_zh: 我们将 Lyria 3 引入专业人士每天工作和创作的工具中。

items.title: Bringing the power of Personal Intelligence to more people
items.summary: We're expanding Personal Intelligence across AI Mode in Search, the Gemini app and Gemini in Chrome.
items.title_zh: 将个人智能的力量带给更多人
items.summary_zh: 我们正在将个人智能扩展到搜索中的 AI 模式、Gemini 应用程序和 Chrome 中的 Gemini。

items.title: Our latest investment in open source security for the AI era
items.summary: Google is making new investments, building new tools and developing code security to improve open source security.
items.title_zh: 我们对人工智能时代开源安全的最新投资
items.summary_zh: 谷歌正在进行新的投资、构建新的工具并开发代码安全性，以提高开源安全性。

items.title: How AI is helping improve heart health in rural Australia
items.summary: A new Google AI initiative aims to improve heart health outcomes for people living in remote Australian communities.
items.title_zh: 人工智能如何帮助改善澳大利亚农村地区的心脏健康
items.summary_zh: 一项新的谷歌人工智能计划旨在改善生活在澳大利亚偏远社区的人们的心脏健康状况。

items.title: Gemini in Google Sheets just achieved state-of-the-art performance.
items.summary: Today we announced new beta features for Gemini in Sheets to help you create, organize and edit entire sheets, from basic tasks to complex data analysis — just describe …
items.title_zh: Google Sheets 中的 Gemini 刚刚实现了最先进的性能。
items.summary_zh: 今天，我们宣布了 Gemini in Sheets 的新测试版功能，可帮助您创建、组织和编辑整个工作表，从基本任务到复杂的数据分析 - 只需描述......

items.title: Seeing sounds
items.summary: Mariano Salcedo ’25, a master’s student in the new Music Technology and Computation Graduate Program, is designing an AI to visualize and express music and other sounds.
items.title_zh: 看到声音
items.summary_zh: Mariano Salcedo ' 25 是新音乐技术和计算研究生项目的硕士生，正在设计一种人工智能来可视化和表达音乐和其他声音。

items.title: How to create “humble” AI
items.summary: An MIT-led team is designing artificial intelligence systems for medical diagnosis that are more collaborative and forthcoming about uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 如何创造“谦逊”的人工智能
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院领导的团队正在设计用于医疗诊断的人工智能系统，该系统对于不确定性更具协作性和主动性。

items.title: What’s the right path for AI?
items.summary: Conference speakers discussed the unfolding trajectory of AI and the benefits of shaping technology to meet people’s needs.
items.title_zh: AI的正确道路是什么？
items.summary_zh: 会议发言人讨论了人工智能的发展轨迹以及塑造技术以满足人们需求的好处。
